text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice Sweep Tosho behind the school building
acting a bit suspiciously.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
A forbidden spell... I'm a little scared, but I'll give
it a try...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
According to the grimoire, this will summon a
great big dragon that can take out a small village
no problem...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If I can summon that, I bet everyone will be super
surprised and do whatever I say!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I can even scare Trainer into giving me a break
from racing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems as though all the consecutive races have
put a lot of pressure on her. I might want to
rethink her schedule...
